headline: Why HP (HPQ) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of personal computing and printing company HP (NYSE:HPQ) jumped 2.5% in the afternoon session after the company announced a series of developments in its additive manufacturing (3D printing) portfolio, highlighted by the introduction of a new, more accessible industrial printer.
